text: I feel a subtle sense of anticipation as I stand here in this sterile, modern space. The glass, the lights, and the purposeful arrangement evoke curiosity. Stepping inside, surrounded by the vivid colors and digital displays, I'm acutely aware of being both participant and observer. The text on the wall stirs an introspective mood; I feel the tension between exposure and introspection, as if the room is asking me to reflect on how I coexist with technology and others. A mixture of inspiration and unease settles within me, as I ponder the questions the exhibit quietly poses.
